2026-06-25.content:
The Assured Open Source Software free tier includes an updated list of curated
binaries for the Go, Java, and Python languages.

For more information, see [List of supported Java and Python packages for the
Assured OSS free
tier](https://docs.cloud.google.com/assured-open-source-software/docs/supported-packages) and [List of supported
Go packages for the Assured OSS free
tier](https://docs.cloud.google.com/assured-open-source-software/docs/supported-packages-go).

summary.title: Assured OSS free tier updated
summary.summary: The Assured Open Source Software free tier now includes an updated list of curated binaries for Go, Java, and Python languages. This enhancement provides more options for developers using these popular programming languages.

2025-09-11.content: Assured Open Source Software (Assured OSS) now supports Go packages. For more information, see [Download Go packages using direct repository access for the free tier](https://cloud.google.com/assured-open-source-software/docs/download-go-packages).

summary.title: Go Packages Now Supported by Assured OSS
summary.summary: Assured Open Source Software (Assured OSS) now supports Go packages, allowing you to download them directly. This feature simplifies the process of managing and utilizing Go open source dependencies.
